summary: Implemented and improved several HUD/status damage functions in src/melee/if/ifstatus, updated corresponding ifstatus prototypes, and adjusted IfDamageState damage fields to signed 16-bit. Bot evidence reported 4 new matches in main/melee/if/ifstatus and multiple ifstatus improvements, but also reported 2 broken matches and a small .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Primary implementation file; replaces several NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs and rewrites HUD damage/status logic, animation setup, digit updates, player lookup, GObj setup, and includes.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/if/ifstatus.c +437/-128, 13 hunks
diff.diff: includes add ifcoget, lb_00F9, lbaudio_ax, gobjgxlink, gobjobject, gobjproc
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F4B84 implemented with digit shake loop and PAD_STACK(8)
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48 signature changed to HSD_GObj* and implemented damage/stamina update logic
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0 and ifStatus_802F61FC implemented with GObj/JObj setup and animation calls

key_files.role: Header prototype updates for recovered function signatures.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/if/ifstatus.h +3/-3, 1 hunk
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48(void) -> ifStatus_802F5B48(HSD_GObj* gobj)
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0(void) -> ifStatus_802F5EC0(IfDamageState* state, s32 player_idx)
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F61FC(void) -> ifStatus_802F61FC(IfDamageState* state, s32 player_idx)

key_files.role: Struct field type refinement for damage counters.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/if/types.h +2/-2, 1 hunk
diff.diff: IfDamageState damage_percent and old_damage changed from u16 to s16

what_changed.text: Replaced NOT_IMPLEMENTED in ifStatus_802F4B84 with HUD digit shake behavior using saved translation arrays, HSD_Randf-based offsets, magnitude clamping, and HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F4B84 implementation
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: ifStatus_802F4B84 new match 100.00%, +851 bytes

what_changed.text: Reworked ifStatus_802F4EDC around clearer player lookup, direct HudIndex animation fields, digit texture animation setup, digit hiding, and color application to digit materials.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F4EDC hunks
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: ifStatus_802F4EDC improved from 71.92% to 80.38%

what_changed.text: Added static inline find_player_by_entity and implemented ifStatus_802F5B48 as a GObj proc that updates damage/HP, clamps values to 0..0x3E7, and sets shake/flag fields based on damage deltas.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: find_player_by_entity and ifStatus_802F5B48 implementation
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: ifStatus_802F5B48 new match 100.00%, +659 bytes

what_changed.text: Implemented ifStatus_802F5EC0 and ifStatus_802F61FC to create or reuse HUD GObjs/JObjs, attach GX links/procs, load and request animations, cache digit JObjs and translations, and initialize player mark/status display state.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0 implementation
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F61FC implementation
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: ifStatus_802F5EC0 improved to 95.20%; ifStatus_802F61FC improved to 96.36%

what_changed.text: Updated recovered prototypes in ifstatus.h and changed IfDamageState.damage_percent and old_damage from unsigned to signed 16-bit, matching code paths that compare against -1 and clamp below zero.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifstatus.h prototype hunk
diff.diff: types.h damage_percent/old_damage u16 -> s16

smart_moves.text: Used real HSD/Baselib APIs and header includes for recovered behavior rather than leaving local undeclared calls or NOT_IMPLEMENTED placeholders.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: added ifcoget, lb_00F9, lbaudio_ax, gobjgxlink, gobjobject, gobjproc includes
diff.diff: GObj_Create, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObj_SetupProc calls

smart_moves.text: Updated owning header prototypes when the bodies revealed non-void signatures.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifstatus.h prototype changes for ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC

smart_moves.text: Recovered signedness of damage fields instead of forcing unsigned logic around sentinel and negative clamp checks.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: types.h u16 -> s16 for damage_percent and old_damage
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48 compares old_damage against -1 and damage_percent against < 0

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves callback or helper parameters, update the owning header prototype rather than keeping void placeholders.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC prototype updates

decomp_lessons.lesson: Field signedness can be inferred from local sentinel and clamp behavior; here old_damage is compared to -1 and damage_percent is clamped below zero, supporting s16 over u16.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: IfDamageState.damage_percent and old_damage changed from u16 to s16
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48 uses old_damage != -1 and damage_percent < 0

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated HUD digit operations may still be left duplicated for matching; candidate cleanup into loops should require verifier evidence because this PR retained repeated Ones/Tens/Hundreds texture and flag sequences.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: repeated HSD_TObjAddAnimAll/HSD_TObjReqAnimAll/HSD_AObjSetRate sequences for Ones, Tens, Hundreds
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: ifStatus_802F4EDC only improved to 80.38%, not a claimed full match

naming_conventions.text: Local role names such as gobj, jobj, tobj, mobj, hud, state, player_idx, ones_digit, tens_digit, and hundreds_digit are used where roles are evident.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F4EDC local variable declarations and digit logic
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0 and ifStatus_802F61FC local declarations

naming_conventions.text: Unproven fields remain address/unknown-style names such as unk9, unk10, unk258, unk268, unk26C, and unk270 instead of speculative semantic renames.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48 uses p->unk9 and p->flags.unk10
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0/ifStatus_802F61FC use hud->unk258, hud->unk268, hud->unk26C, hud->unk270

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was retained in several functions to influence stack layout.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F4B84 PAD_STACK(8)
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0 PAD_STACK(0x18)
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F61FC PAD_STACK(0x10)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Standards require explicit verifier evidence for PAD_STACK; the bot report supports some function matches/improvements but does not isolate each PAD_STACK use.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used natural for-loops for fixed-count HUD player and digit iteration.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifStatus_802F4B84 for i < 4 over jobjs/translations
diff.diff: find_player_by_entity for i < 6 over ifStatus_HudInfo.players
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5EC0 for i < 4 caches jobjs and translations

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Direct chained animation descriptor traversal was used for HSD_TexAnim selection instead of temporary MatAnimJoint/TexAnim variables.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: HSD_TObjAddAnimAll uses hud->janim_selection_joints->child->child...->aobjdesc->fobjdesc
diff.diff: removed anim_base and mat_anim/tex_anim temporaries in ifStatus_802F4EDC
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence does not explain whether the chained traversal is authored style or matching-driven.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Bot checkdiff/objdiff-style report provided match/regression accounting for the PR.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered bodies should drive owning header prototypes
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2537, ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, and ifStatus_802F61FC were implemented with concrete parameters and ifstatus.h was updated from void prototypes to matching signatures.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: ifstatus.h prototype changes
diff.diff: corresponding function definition changes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Signed field recovery from sentinel and clamp behavior
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2537 changed IfDamageState.damage_percent and old_damage from u16 to s16 alongside code that compares old_damage to -1 and clamps damage_percent below zero.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: types.h field type changes
diff.diff: ifStatus_802F5B48 sentinel and negative clamp checks

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK use from this PR as normal style; evidence only shows it was present, while standards require narrow verifier evidence for retaining it.
Do not infer that direct child->child animation descriptor traversal is preferred authored style; the PR evidence does not explain that choice.
Do not treat the bot report as proof that all touched functions were cleanly matched without regressions; it explicitly reports broken matches and a .sdata2 regression.
